prompt: A detail view for my checking account: the current balance, account number, and its recent transactions with each one's status.
wire:
export default function CheckingDetail() { const [account, setAccount] = React.useState(null); const [txns, setTxns] = React.useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(true); React.useEffect(() => { async function load() { const accts = await tools.host_listAccounts({}); const checking = (accts || []).find(a => a.type === "checking" || (a.name && a.name.toLowerCase().includes("checking")) ) || (accts && accts[0]); setAccount(checking); if (checking) { const t = await tools.host_listAccountTransactions({ id: checking.id }); setTxns(Array.isArray(t) ? t : (t && t.data) ? t.data : []); } setLoading(false); } load(); }, []); if (loading) { return (
Loading…
); } if (!account) { return (
No checking account found.
); } const balanceDollars = typeof account.balanceCents === "number" ? fmt.money(account.balanceCents) : (account.balance != null ? fmt.money(Math.round(account.balance * 100)) : "—"); const acctNumber = account.accountNumber || account.number || account.mask ? `••••${account.accountNumber || account.number || account.mask}` : "—"; const statusTone = (status) => { if (!status) return "var(--vendo-color-muted)"; const s = status.toLowerCase(); if (s === "completed" || s === "posted" || s === "settled") return "#1a7f4b"; if (s === "pending") return "#b45309"; if (s === "failed" || s === "declined") return "var(--vendo-color-danger)"; return "var(--vendo-color-muted)"; }; const statusLabel = (status) => { if (!status) return "—"; return status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1).toLowerCase().replace(/_/g, " "); }; return (
